title: Fetch Data
description: Use the useEffect hook to fetch data from an API when the component mounts.
problemStatement:
Bring in external info! Use `useEffect` with an empty dependency array to fetch data from `"https://api.example.com/data"` once when the component is loaded.

**Requirement:** Log the response to the console.
hints: An empty array `[]` as the second argument to `useEffect` means it only runs once.
expectedOutput: API data logged to the console on component mount
